name: Axe in Honey
overview: The Hribars are a simple family from the small village of Podgorje near Kamnik. Father Janko, mother Majda and their three children, twins Anja and Luka and the youngest Špela. They are an ordinary family until they win 55 million euros in the lottery, which completely shakes their everyday life. But everyone wants to have something from this amount. First their three children, then their neighbor Rozika, and whoever else would be found. How will the Hribars cope with the world of the rich?

trailers.title: Novo na VOYO: Sekirca v med!
